compressed_prompt: Convert the sentence into an email format, ensuring it includes at least 10 placeholders like [name]. Use square brackets: The boots are warm but a little uncomfortable.
response:
**Subject: Feedback on Your [Product Name] Boots**

Dear [Customer Name],

Thank you for your recent purchase from [Company Name]. We hope you are enjoying your new [Product Color] boots from our [Product Line] collection.

We are writing to follow up on your experience. We received your feedback stating, **"The boots are warm but a little uncomfortable."**

Your input is invaluable to us at [Department Name]. To help us improve, could you please provide a few more details?

1.  Which specific size did you order, [Product Size]?
2.  How would you rate the fit on a scale from [Rating Scale]?
3.  Are the boots uncomfortable in a particular area, such as the [Specific Area]?
4.  How long have you been wearing them, [Time Period]?
5.  May we have your order number, [Order Number]?

We would like to address this for you. Please contact our support team at [Support Email] or [Support Phone Number] at your earliest convenience. A member of our team, like [Representative Name], would be happy to assist.

As a token of our appreciation for your feedback, please accept this [Discount Code] for your next purchase on [Website URL].

Sincerely,

The [Company Name] Team

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Address]
